channel.title: AfroTools Blog
channel.description: Expert guides on African tax, PAYE, currency, business, and finance. Practical articles for professionals across Nigeria, Kenya, South Africa, Ghana and more.

item.title: How to Open a Domiciliary Account in Nigeria 2026 — Complete Guide
item.description: Step-by-step guide to opening a dom account in Nigeria. Compare GTBank, Zenith, Access Bank, UBA and First Bank requirements, fees and documents.

item.title: Import Duty Calculator Ghana 2026 — GRA Customs Rates Guide
item.description: Calculate Ghana import duty in 2026. GRA customs rates, ECOWAS CET, VAT 15%, NHIL, GETFund levy and worked examples for cars, electronics and clothing.

item.title: Import Duty South Africa 2026 — SARS Customs Tariff Guide
item.description: Complete guide to South Africa import duty 2026. SARS tariff rates for vehicles, electronics, clothing. Step-by-step calculation with worked examples.

item.title: How to Read Your WAEC Result 2026 — Grading System & Aggregate Guide
item.description: Understand your WAEC result in 2026. WAEC grading scale A1–F9, aggregate score calculation, university cutoffs for Medicine, Engineering and Law.

item.title: How Much Does a Wedding Cost in Nigeria 2026 — Full Budget
item.description: Complete Nigerian wedding budget breakdown 2026. Traditional engagement costs, white wedding expenses, Lagos vs Abuja vs PH prices. Budget ₦2M–₦50M+.

item.title: NYSC Allowance 2026 — Financial Survival Guide for Corps Members
item.description: Monthly NYSC allowance breakdown, state top-ups table, camp expenses, savings strategies with T-Bills and Piggyvest, side hustle ideas and post-NYSC money plan.

item.title: How Much Rent Can I Afford in Lagos 2026 — Salary & Area Guide
item.description: How much rent can you afford in Lagos on your salary? 12-neighbourhood rent guide with 2026 prices, affordability formula and move-in cost breakdown.

item.title: Solar Panel Costs Nigeria 2026 — Complete Installation Price Guide
item.description: Solar panel prices and full system packages in Nigeria 2026. Compare inverters, batteries and installers. Basic ₦800K, Standard ₦2.5M, Premium ₦5M+.

item.title: How to Calculate Tithe on Your Nigerian Salary — Gross vs Net
item.description: Gross vs net tithe debate explained. Worked examples at ₦200K, ₦500K, ₦1M and ₦3M monthly salary with PAYE deduction impact included.

item.title: M-Pesa vs OPay vs PalmPay vs MoMo — Best Mobile Money App 2026
item.description: Compare M-Pesa, MTN MoMo, OPay, PalmPay, Wave and Airtel Money fees and features. Country-by-country recommendation for Nigeria, Kenya, Ghana and more.

item.title: Best Countries to Do Business in Africa 2026 — Ranked
item.description: Top 10 African countries for business in 2026 ranked by ease, tax rates, digital infrastructure and opportunity. Rwanda, Mauritius and South Africa lead.

item.title: How to Create a Professional Invoice in Nigeria 2026
item.description: Complete guide to Nigerian invoicing 2026. FIRS requirements, TIN, VAT at 7.5%, invoice templates for freelancers, services and product businesses.

item.title: AfCFTA Explained — How Africa’s Free Trade Area Affects Import Duties
item.description: How AfCFTA reduces import duties across Africa in 2026. Tariff liberalization schedule, rules of origin, country implementation status and practical guide for traders.

item.title: How to Choose a Business Name in Africa — Legal Guide 2026
item.description: How to choose and register a business name in Nigeria, Kenya, Ghana and South Africa. CAC, BRS, RGD and CIPC requirements, trademark tips and domain strategy.

item.title: How to Create a BOQ for Construction in Nigeria 2026
item.description: Step-by-step BOQ guide for Nigerian building projects. Current 2026 material prices (cement, rods, tiles), labour costs and worked example for a 3-bedroom bungalow.

item.title: YouTube Monetization in Africa 2026 — Requirements & Earnings Guide
item.description: How much does YouTube pay African creators in 2026? RPM rates by country, tax obligations, W-8BEN guide and revenue streams beyond AdSense.

item.title: WhatsApp Business API for African SMEs 2026 — Setup & Pricing Guide
item.description: Complete WhatsApp Business API guide for African businesses. Setup steps, BSP options, conversation pricing for Nigeria/Kenya/SA, and automation use cases.

item.title: Land Survey Costs in Nigeria 2026 — Surveyor Fees & C of O Guide
item.description: How much does land survey cost in Nigeria in 2026? State-by-state surveyor fees, Certificate of Occupancy process, C of O costs and step-by-step guide.

item.title: Stokvel Guide South Africa 2026 — How to Start, Run & Grow
item.description: Complete SA stokvel guide 2026. Types of stokvels, how to draft the constitution, choose a bank account, invest your pool funds and avoid common pitfalls.

item.title: African Startup Funding 2026 — Grants, VCs, Angels & Accelerators
item.description: Where to find startup funding in Africa in 2026. Grants, 12 active VC firms, accelerators (YC, Techstars, Flat6Labs), angels and alternative funding sources.
